input.initialPrompt: I have some failing tests and want to use hot reload to iterate faster. Can you set it up for me?

data.reasoningText: The user wants to set up hot reload for their .NET test project so they can iterate faster on failing tests. Let me first look at the project files to understand what we're working with.

data.content: You can use `dotnet watch test` to automatically re-run tests whenever you save a file. Let me start it up:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolCalls.name: bash

data.content:
`dotnet watch test` is now running. It will automatically re-run tests whenever you save a file.

Right now there's a compilation error:

> **CS0246**: The type or namespace name `ArgumentException` could not be found (missing `using System;`)

The watcher is waiting for you to fix the code — once you save changes, it'll rebuild and re-run automatically. Would you like me to fix that error for you?
